projects.name: Sagada Heights Hotel
projects.description: Detailed 10-storey hotel building with approximately 2,000 sq.m gross floor area, owned by Kiley Clan Foundation. Main structural system is reinforced concrete. Includes guest rooms, lobby/public areas, kitchen, laundry, back-of-house, elevators, and full MEPF systems.
